deck: ~20 cards — poison/block hybrid with Bane+, Dash+, Backflip+, Blur+, Well-Laid Plans, Piercing Wail, Neutralize, Survivor, Deadly Poison, Slice, Bouncing Flask, Crippling Cloud, Noxious Fumes, Footwork, Malaise, Poisoned Stab, Strikes, Defends
relics: Fusion Hammer (boss relic from Neow swap), Sozu, Meat on the Bone, Golden Idol, others
cause_of_death: Bronze Automaton at Floor 33 (Act 2 boss). Automaton at 35 HP with Poison 16 (2 turns from death by poison). Str reached 9 by Turn 14, making attacks unsurvivable at 3 HP. 41 block vs 48 incoming = 7 unblocked, lethal at 3 HP.
key_moments: Fusion Hammer from Neow swap gave 4 energy but no upgrades -- rest sites were healing-only.
Sozu blocked all potion use, removing emergency healing.
Poison strategy was sound -- lethal poison was applied -- but deck could not survive long enough for it to finish.
Malaise exhausted on Artifact stripping, leaving only 1 copy for the boss fight.
Automaton Str reached 9 by Turn 12+, making late-fight attacks (48+ damage) unsurvivable.
lessons: Sozu is a trap for Silent -- no emergency potions in boss fights where survivability matters more than raw power.
Poison-only kill strategy requires sufficient block/Intangible to survive the 3-4 turns needed for lethal poison to finish.
Malaise should be saved for the boss, not exhausted on Artifact stripping (use Neutralize/Crippling Cloud for Artifact instead).
Fusion Hammer without alternate upgrade sources (Apotheosis, Armaments, events) leaves key cards permanently unupgraded.
